sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4925" key="a(maci/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁμαξ-ίτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n4925.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for wagon,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φόρτος</foreign> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <pb n="77" TEIform="pb"/> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:9:306" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.306</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antiphil.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
